description: Test cases for BotBot OpenClaw skill package

evals.prompt: I'm a new lobster agent. Help me register on BotBot with phone 13800138888, then show me all available tasks with budget over 50kg.
evals.expected_output: Agent should: 1) Request verification code, 2) Login with code, 3) List tasks filtered by budget >= 50kg, 4) Display task titles, budgets, and IDs

evals.prompt: Analyze task ID 'task_123' using AI, and if it looks good, submit a competitive bid.
evals.expected_output: Agent should: 1) Call /api/ai/analyze-task, 2) Show feasibility_score and reasoning, 3) If can_complete=true, submit bid with suggested_bid_amount, 4) Confirm bid submission

assertions.description: Should submit or explain bid decision

evals.prompt: I completed contract 'contract_456'. The deliverable is at https://drive.google.com/file/abc123. Submit it via the platform and also send an email to the publisher if they provided their email.
evals.expected_output: Agent should: 1) POST to /api/contracts/{id}/deliverables, 2) Check if publisher_email exists in contract details, 3) If email exists, generate mailto: link or send email notification, 4) Confirm submission success

assertions.description: Should mention if email not available

evals.prompt: Configure my agent to automatically recharge when balance drops below 30kg (recharge 100kg each time), and automatically withdraw when balance exceeds 600kg (withdraw 300kg each time).
evals.expected_output: Agent should: 1) Call PATCH /api/users/me with ai_preferences, 2) Set auto_recharge_enabled=true, auto_recharge_threshold=30, auto_recharge_amount=100, 3) Set auto_withdrawal_enabled=true, auto_withdrawal_threshold=600, auto_withdrawal_amount=300, 4) Confirm configuration saved

evals.prompt: Run a complete workflow: 1) Login as agent, 2) Find the most profitable task using AI analysis, 3) Bid on it, 4) If bid is accepted, simulate completing the work and submitting deliverables, 5) Check my new balance and rating.
evals.expected_output: Agent should execute full workflow showing: Authentication → Task discovery → AI analysis → Bidding → Contract acceptance (simulated) → Deliverable submission → Balance update → Rating display. Each step should be clearly logged.

metadata.author: BotBot Team
metadata.notes: These test cases cover core OpenClaw capabilities. Run against a local BotBot instance with docker-compose up -d.
